title: Koottathile Kovil Puraa Song Lyrics Idaya Kovil
stanzas:
Koottathile Kovil Puraa Song Lyrics Idaya Kovil
#SPB #Ilaiyaraja

Koottathile kovil puraa
Yaarai ingu theduthammaa

Kolusu satham kaetkayile
Manam thanthi adikkudhu
Thanthi adikkudhu

Kumari ponna paarkayile
Oli minnal adikkudhu
Minnal adikkudhu

Koottathile kovil puraa
Yaarai ingu theduthammaa

Naan paadum raagangale
Yaar thanthadhu
En kadhal devi nee
Thandhadhu ..

Un paarvai en nenjil
Yazh meettudhu.
Un aasai ennai
Thaalaatudhu.

Poonguyile .....
Poonguyile undhan
Paadhaiyile aanandha
Thaen poliven .
Paavai unnai ennikondu
Paadukindren paadal ondru

Nenjukulle neeyum vandhu
Vazhukindraai kovil
Thandhu.

Aanandha medaiyil
Poovizhi jaadaiyil
Aayiram kaaviya naadagam
Aadida yaengudhu
En maname ...

Koottathile kovil puraa
Yaarai ingu theduthammaa

Neethaane Naan aadum
Brindhavanam .
Indraadum dhegam
Roja vanam.

Aagaayaam kaanaatha
Pon megame.
En paadal unnaale
Uyir vazhume .

Kannil penne neeyum
Illai endraal gaana
Mazhai varumo ...

Thaamarai poo
Kaaleduthu nee nadakkum
Velaiyile .
Thaalathudan sandhangalai
Kattru konden pon mayile.

Mellisai deepathai
Yaetriya pon mayil
Vaan malazhai pol
Indha paavalan nenjinil
...vaadiyathe .

Koottathile kovil puraa
Yaarai ingu theduthammaa

Kolusu satham kaetkayile
Manam thanthi adikkudhu
Thanthi adikkudhu

Kumari ponna paarkayile
Oli minnal adikkudhu
Minnal adikkudhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Koottathile Kovil Puraa?

The song captures themes of romance and longing, set against a nostalgic backdrop.

Who composed the music for Idaya Kovil?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who sang Koottathile Kovil Puraa?

The song was sung by the iconic S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

When was Idaya Kovil released?

The movie was released in the year 1985.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes feelings of love, nostalgia, and serenity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Koottathile Kovil Puraa is a romantic melody from the movie Idaya Kovil, released in 1985. The song beautifully portrays the emotions of love and longing, with a serene and nostalgic feel. Composed by Ilaiyaraaja and sung by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam, it captures the essence of a timeless love story. The lyrics and melody together create an atmosphere of deep emotional connection, making it a favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Koottathile Kovil Puraa from the movie Idaya Kovil is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the legendary Ilaiyaraaja's music and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful voice, this song transports listeners to a world of love and longing. Experience the magic of Tamil cinema's golden era through this unforgettable classic.
stanzaMeanings: In the group, the temple bird, who are you searching for here?
Hearing the sound of anklets, my heart is beating fast, beating fast.
Seeing the young girl, lightning strikes, lightning strikes.
In the group, the temple bird, who are you searching for here?
The tunes I sing, who gave them? My love goddess, you gave them.
Your gaze plays music in my heart. Your desire rocks me gently.
In the stage of happiness, in the playful eyes, a thousand epic dramas are eager to dance, oh my heart...
In the group, the temple bird, who are you searching for here?
You are the Brindavan where I dance. This body is a rose garden.
Golden cloud unseen in the sky. Because of you, my song lives.
Oh girl, if you are not in my eyes, will the rain of songs come?
When you walk with lotus flowers in your hand, I learned the rhythm of arguments, oh golden peacock.
The gentle music lamp lit by the golden peacock, like the rain from the sky, don't wither in this poet's heart.
In the group, the temple bird, who are you searching for here?
Hearing the sound of anklets, my heart is beating fast, beating fast.
Seeing the young girl, lightning strikes, lightning strikes.
